sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34001" key="e)mbla/sthma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμβλάστ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n34001.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐλάτη</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg002:111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:412" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.412</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
